defs: The morning star; the star which ushers in the day; -- usually the planet Venus, when seen before and just after sunrise.
quotes: A dark place, until the day dawn, and the day-star arise in your hearts.

defs: The sun, as the orb of day.
quotes: So sinks the day-star in the ocean bed, And yet anon repairs his drooping head, And tricks his beams, and with new-spangled ore Flames in the forehead of the morning sky.
